title: Profile Violation — c2pa.placed with Empty parameters (Missing ingredientIds)
description: Verifies that a conformant validator correctly reports a valid claim signature for a manifest where the c2pa.placed action has an empty parameters object, omitting the required ingredientIds field. A profile-aware validator MUST report this as a non-conformance.

validationStatus.explanation: The claim signature is cryptographically valid. The empty parameters on c2pa.placed (missing ingredientIds) is a profile-level violation.
